name: Event Timeline App Visual Redesign - Muted Direction Copy v42
note: This is a Figma reconstruction handoff file, not a native .fig source. This version lowers the visual priority of the My Following tracking-direction copy while keeping the latest-node message as the primary reading target.

topicCard.dateAlignment: same row as latest-update summary box, measured after layout
topicCard.directionText: tertiary, softer gray, smaller size, lower weight
topicCard.latestNodeMessage: primary, stronger weight with soft highlight
topicCard.textAlignment: direction text and latest node message share the same left text start

directionCopy.intent: Keep tracking direction readable but visually behind the latest node message

textRightEdge.myFollowing: topic text column aligns to baseline
textRightEdge.timeline: node title and summary use a stable 248px reading lane reserved away from the chevron

timelineChevron.textRule: .timeline .node h3, .timeline .node p { width: min(248px, calc(100% - 21px)); text-wrap: wrap; }

bottomTimelineTab.replacement: clock icon in the second bottom tab
bottomTimelineTab.alignment: centered; pure icon entry visually matches the vertical height of the My Following icon plus label stack

selectedState.accent: coral accent from the current timeline theme

recommendationCard.typeChip: removed from card; category remains in top tab
recommendationCard.followedState: moved under the existing left icon
